UserPingConfig.Name: Discord User Notifications
UserPingConfig.Label: Configure Notifications
UserPingConfig.Hint: Add Player Character to Discord User ID notifications

GmUrl.Name: GM Channel URL
GmUrl.Hint: Discord webhook URL for Gamemaster channel.

GmUserName.Name: GM channel Discord name
GmUserName.Hint: Name used for Gamemaster channel Discord posts

GmAvatar.Name: GM Discord avatar image
GmAvatar.Hint: Avatar image used for Gamemaster channel Discord posts

IcUrl.Name: IC Channel URL
IcUrl.Hint: Discord webhook URL for in character channel.

IcUserName.Name: IC Discord Name
IcUserName.Hint: Name used for in character channel Discord posts

IcAvatar.Name: IC Discord avatar image
IcAvatar.Hint: Avatar image used for in character channel Discord posts

OocUrl.Name: OOC Channel URL
OocUrl.Hint: Discord webhook URL for out of character channel.

OocUserName.Name: OOC Discord Name
OocUserName.Hint: Name used for out of character channel Discord posts

OocAvatar.Name: OOC Discord avatar image
OocAvatar.Hint: Avatar image used for out of character channel Discord posts

OverrideRemoteUrl.Name: Override Remote URL
OverrideRemoteUrl.Hint: Debug use only. Overrides remotebase URL for testing and development.

UserPingConfig.Title: Player Character to Discord User ID Notifications
UserPingConfig.Description: Select a PC and associate it with a Discord User ID.
UserPingConfig.DescriptionUserID: The Discord User ID may be obtained by right clicking on a user in the Discord app and selecting Copy User ID
UserPingConfig.AddMapping: Add PC to User ID Notification
